mapper.sql: SELECT h.house_id, h.project_id, h.building_id, h.unit_id, h.house_code, h.house_no, h.floor, h.house_type_id, h.house_type_name, h.area, h.rent_price, h.deposit, h.orientation, h.decoration, h.facilities, h.house_status, h.is_featured, h.view_count, h.status, h.allocation_type, h.is_fresh_graduate, h.manager_phone, h.create_by, h.create_time, h.update_by, h.update_time, h.remark, h.del_flag, p.project_name FROM hz_house h LEFT JOIN hz_project p ON h.project_id = p.project_id
